languages.text: "Здравия желаю!". {n}Меровец салютует вам и вытягивается во фрунт всей своей низкорослой нескладной фигурой.{/n} "Сержант тридцать второго меровского Яруб Вукчик, к вашим услугам".
"Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."
languages.original_text: "Здравия желаю!". {n}Меровец салютует вам и вытягивается во фрунт всей своей низкорослой нескладной фигурой.{/n} "Сержант тридцать второго меровского Яруб Вукчик, к вашим услугам".

traits.locale_text: "Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."
"Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."
"Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."

languages.text: «¡Saludos!». {n}El meroviano se cuadra, estirándose para alcanzar su escasa altura máxima.{/n} «Sargento Jarub Vukchik, del 32.º de Merov, a su servicio».
languages.original_text: "Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."

traits.locale_text: «¡Saludos!». {n}El meroviano se cuadra, estirándose para alcanzar su escasa altura máxima.{/n} «Sargento Jarub Vukchik, del 32.º de Merov, a su servicio».

languages.text: “敬礼！”{n}那位梅罗夫士兵向你敬礼，随即立正站好，竭力把自己不怎么起眼的身形全部展露出来。{/n}“梅罗夫第32团，雅鲁布·武克奇克军士，听候您的差遣。”
languages.original_text: "Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."

traits.locale_text: “敬礼！”{n}那位梅罗夫士兵向你敬礼，随即立正站好，竭力把自己不怎么起眼的身形全部展露出来。{/n}“梅罗夫第32团，雅鲁布·武克奇克军士，听候您的差遣。”

languages.text: « Salutations ! » {n}Le Merovien vous salue et se met au garde-à-vous, redressant de toute sa courte taille sa silhouette pataude.{/n} « Sergent Jarub Vukchik, 32e régiment de Merov, à votre service. »
languages.original_text: "Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."

traits.locale_text: « Salutations ! » {n}Le Merovien vous salue et se met au garde-à-vous, redressant de toute sa courte taille sa silhouette pataude.{/n} « Sergent Jarub Vukchik, 32e régiment de Merov, à votre service. »

languages.text: "Selam olsun!" {n}Merovlu seni selamlıyor ve hazır ola geçerek biçimsiz vücudunu tüm o gösterişsiz boyuyla dikleştiriyor.{/n} "Çavuş Jarub Vukchik, 32. Merov Alayı, emrinizdedir."
languages.original_text: "Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."

traits.locale_text: "Selam olsun!" {n}Merovlu seni selamlıyor ve hazır ola geçerek biçimsiz vücudunu tüm o gösterişsiz boyuyla dikleştiriyor.{/n} "Çavuş Jarub Vukchik, 32. Merov Alayı, emrinizdedir."

languages.text: "Seid gegrüßt!" {n}Der Merovianer salutiert vor dir und steht stramm, während er sich ungeschickt zu seiner ganzen Größe aufrichtet.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32. Merov-Regiment, zu Euren Diensten."
languages.original_text: "Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."

traits.locale_text: "Seid gegrüßt!" {n}Der Merovianer salutiert vor dir und steht stramm, während er sich ungeschickt zu seiner ganzen Größe aufrichtet.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32. Merov-Regiment, zu Euren Diensten."

languages.text: 「お元気ですか？」{n}メロヴィアンが敬礼し、不器用な体を伸ばして、低い身長を最大限に引き立てます。{/n}「メロヴィアン軍のジャラブ・ヴクチク中尉、お役に立てれば幸いです。」
languages.original_text: "Hail!" {n}The Merovian salutes you and stands to attention, drawing his awkward form up to his full, unimpressive height.{/n} "Sergeant Jarub Vukchik, 32nd Merov, at your service."

traits.locale_text: 「お元気ですか？」{n}メロヴィアンが敬礼し、不器用な体を伸ばして、低い身長を最大限に引き立てます。{/n}「メロヴィアン軍のジャラブ・ヴクチク中尉、お役に立てれば幸いです。」
